CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-22-2016 Continued To Apr-13-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Motion For Summary Judgment/Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Feb-29-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF BROADCAST MUSIC, INC.'S motion for summary judgment or summary adjudication is denied in its entirety. There is a triable issue as to the amount defendant owes plaintiff, as indicated in the declaration of Osman Uner. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Ann Delgado, CSR #11185 (302/HK)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Motion For Summary Judgment/Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Jan-26-2016 Continued To Feb-29-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

PLAINTIFF BROADCAST MUSIC, INC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/Summary Adjudication is continued to February 29, 2016 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302, to give the opposing party a chance to comply with SF Local Rule 2.7B. The opposing party shall immediately provide a courtesy copy of the opposition to dept. 302 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/EG)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-04-2016 Continued To Mar-09-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
